subcodes.first_line: Say: All praise be unto Thee, O Beloved of my heart and Object of my innermost being! I beseech Thee by the Sovereign of Names through which Thou hast subdued [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی لک الحمد یا محبوب قلبی و مقصود سری اسئلک بسلطان الاسماء الذی به سخرت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @praise and encouragement
